title: Tangy Gooey Vietnamese Crust
description: A vegan-friendly brunch dish featuring gooey crust with a tangy currant sauce, perfect for savory or sweet cravings.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons apple cider vinegar
ingredients.notes: or white wine vinegar for a slight difference in flavor

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup maple syrup or agave nectar

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine almond flour, melted coconut oil, apple cider vinegar, salt, and currants. Mix well until no lumps remain.
Transfer mixture to an ungreased baking dish. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and gooey in the center.
Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, mix maple syrup with juice from one lime. Stir in red pepper flakes. Heat over medium heat until it starts to bubble but do not let it boil.
Once the crust is done, pour the hot currant mixture into a blender and process until smooth. Pour this mixture back onto the warm crust, spreading evenly.
Let it cool for 10-15 minutes before serving. The tangy sauce should be drizzled over the top to serve as an additional layer of flavor.
